Chronology of every recorded fact about [[The Eight-Man Empire]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — The armor of the Eight-Man Empire is a cross between a Remnant and a construct, and it is passed to a successor when a member dies.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — The Eight-Man Empire is a group where even ten thousand Gold sacred artists could not scratch their armor.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — The Eight-Man Empire is a powerful entity whose reputation is supposedly exaggerated.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Del'rek joined the Eight-Man Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The Eight-Man Empire calls up would-be squires from their territory for the tournament.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The Eight-Man Empire has four teams from different warbands: Ghost-Blade, Flame-Gift, Blood-Chorus, and Nine-Hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — The Eight-Man Empire controls warlords from Blood-Chorus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Ziel fought as a champion of the Eight-Man Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — The Eight-Man Empire has a tower where spectators were located.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — The Eight-Man Empire is a faction where Larian was a renowned archer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — The Eight-Man Empire has a plain tower with eight gold-armored men and women hovering over it.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — The Eight-Man Empire consists of gold-armored figures who are considered a Monarch collectively, but are individually Sages or Heralds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — The Eight-Man Empire walked out a door.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — The Eight-Man Empire is looking for an excuse to support one side or the other.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — The Eight-Man Empire consists of wandering conquerors and a collective Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — The founding members of the Eight-Man Empire crafted eight suits of golden armor that act as Divine Treasures to link their wills.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — The Eight-Man Empire would support Mercy's mother if she won.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Eight-Man Empire is not known for meticulous attention to detail.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — The Eight-Man Empire gave Sophara a Tear of the Deep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin absorbed a thought construct from the Eight-Man Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — The Eight-Man Empire gave Yerin mental enhancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Kiuran suggested Yerin could kill the Eight-Man Empire.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Larian belongs to the Eight-Man Empire.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — The Eight-Man Empire is a concept or entity that Lindon recalls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Eight-Man Empire appeared to witness Reigan's triumph.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — The Eight-Man Empire was hired by Reigan Shen.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Eight-Man Empire consists of at least two members present at the island siege.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — The Eight-Man Empire invited Lindon and Yerin to join them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — The Eight-Man Empire has a cognition enhancement construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — The Eight-Man Empire is a group represented by Larian.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Larian addresses the Eight-Man Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Eight-Man Empire was down to six members.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Eight-Man Empire vanished.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The Eight-Man Empire trains with the spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Reigan researched the armor of the Eight-Man Empire to design the collar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — The Eight-Man Empire held back the Dragon for Emriss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — The Eight-Man Empire is on Lindon's side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — The Eight-Man Empire assaulted the Bleeding Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — The Eight-Man Empire used power of all aspects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — Larian and Del’rek represent the Eight-Man Empire.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Larian is from the Eight-Man Empire.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
